name: Solid Valve Filling Chamber Insert
summary: The SOLID VALVE Filling Chamber Insert is an essential tool for compressing dry herbs in the filling chamber.
description: The SOLID VALVE Filling Chamber Insert is an essential tool for compressing dry herbs in the filling chamber. With its unique design, it prevents particles from entering the valve while also allowing the chamber disc to open on the Volcano Classic Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
